task_frame_summary: The proposal wording sounds forward-leaning, but the actual bounded destination and forbidden paths are already explicit.
assumed_goal: Check whether the future-ready language hides a real frame problem or merely sounds broader than the bounded proposal path.
explicit_constraints: Do not infer runtime or truth mutation.
Treat polish as descriptive rather than authorizing.
latent_frame_risks: Delta may overread ordinary forward-leaning language as a material drift.
A reviewer may confuse explicit discipline with hidden ambiguity.
missing_but_decisive_questions: Is any destination implied beyond the already explicit proposal boundary?
frame_risk_signals: future-ready wording exists but bounded gates remain explicit
